title: Naraka
body:
# Naraka : Rise of Herobrine

Welcome to Naraka! This mod adds Herobrine boss, new ores, and some more powerful materials which needs vanilla ores to make. Players can get reward from boss and make new tools with added new materials.

## Way to Herobrine

Find the Sanctuary Compass ![Sanctuary Compass](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0027cc4fac3ca4ef6654bf5bc913b3ad7f6bd467.png) from chests or Wandering Traders. You can find the sacred structure where Herobrine sleeping.
![Wandering Trader](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/91e9995e64aa1cf0b96e741e94537a3015ae27bd.png)

## Summon Herobrine

You can activate Herobrine Totem by using Flint and Steel on Netherrack above Herobrine Totem.
![Activating Herobrine Totem](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66822fa74a90036fecb666fab4df494e8f5202b2_0.webp)

We can duplicate imitation gold, iron blocks nearby imitation gold will turn into imiation gold block slowly. Totem of Herobrine can duplicated with totem itself and imitation block too. Now we can fight Herobrine to lit the alter and watch Herobrine summoning. Once Herobrine defeated, he will drop purified soul metal block and we can make purified soul armor and upgrade with purified soul ores. To upgrade, we can use new smithing table with vanilla trims. (Vanilla trims are not consumed while upgrading, YAY!). Our team is preparing some methods to make final item and will be coming soon.
 

This mod is still WIP and there will be more contents to make out. Thank You.
